instruction: Describe the potential impact of an attacker exploiting this vulnerability.
input: A firmware update vulnerability exists in the login.cgi functionality of Wavlink AC3000 M33A8.V5030.210505. A specially crafted HTTP request can lead to arbitrary firmware update. An attacker can send an unauthenticated message to trigger this vulnerability.
output: Exploitation of this vulnerability can lead to unauthorized changes to the firmware, potentially allowing the execution of arbitrary code, which may compromise system integrity and availability (CIA Triad).
